title: FormatInt8 — packs into 1 byte
description: JSON + binary (de)serialization of FormatInt8 (number branded {integer:true; min:-128; max:127}); the [-128,127] bounds select a 1-byte signed binary encoding while JSON writes the plain number.
notes: Format-aware binary width: the int8 bounds pin every value to a single byte (getBinaryByteSizes [1,1,1]); JSON is lossless plain-number text.
